audit_items.proof_trace: All heap allocation results in midl.c are null-checked before dereference: mdb_midl_alloc guards with `if (ids)` (L107), mdb_midl_grow checks `if (!idn) return ENOMEM` (L136), and mdb_midl_need/append check realloc failure before writing. Functions that accept MDB_IDL pointer parameters (mdb_midl_search, mdb_midl_sort, mdb_mid2l_*, etc.) require non-null input by C API contract, and all callers in mdb.c null-check allocations before use. The mdb_midl_insert function with potential issues is dead code gated by #if 0.
